title: Supersonic Media Manifest
description: Upload plan for the staging media pipeline (tools/staging-rest.mjs media-dry-run / media-upload). Each entry maps a repo-local image file to its media-library metadata. altText is mandatory and must describe the image; MEDIA-ALT-1 in tools/validate-copy.mjs rejects empty, too-short, filename, or placeholder alt text. Generate data/media-manifest.json from this schema in a cloned site repo; data/media-manifest.example.json is a worked example.

file.description: Repo-relative path to the image file to upload (jpg, jpeg, png, webp, avif, svg, or gif).

title.description: Media library title for the attachment.

altText.description: Descriptive alt text. Must not be empty, the filename, or a generic placeholder like img_1234.

caption.description: Optional caption shown under the image where the theme renders captions.

attachToSlug.description: Optional page slug this image is intended for. Informational in the upload plan; attachment is wired by the page composition.
